implicitEmptyObjectType.tlua(6,17): error TLUA2345: Argument of type '{}' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Record<string, string>'.
  Index signature for type 'string' is missing in type '{}'.


==== implicitEmptyObjectType.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/1563
    
    function f() {
      local v: unknown = "lol";
      local acceptsRecord = (record: Record<string, string>) => {};
      acceptsRecord(v || {});
                    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type '{}' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Record<string, string>'.
